mapper.select: SELECT TICKETNO, ISSUE_DATE, CLEAR_DATE, REASON, TRUNK_NAME, DIRECTION, TARGET_SYSNAME, WARNING_DATE FROM MBA.TB_ROADM_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_TICKET WHERE REASON = #{reason} AND CLEAR_DATE IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MBA.TB_ROADM_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_TICKET(TICKETNO, ISSUE_DATE, CLEAR_DATE, REASON, TRUNK_NAME, DIRECTION, TARGET_SYSNAME, WARNING_DATE) VALUES(#{ticketno}, #{issueDate}, #{clearDate}, #{reason}, #{trunkName}, #{direction}, #{targetSysname}, #{warningDate}) ON CONFLICT (TICKETNO) DO UPDATE SET ISSUE_DATE = EXCLUDED.ISSUE_DATE, CLEAR_DATE = EXCLUDED.CLEAR_DATE, REASON = EXCLUDED.REASON, TRUNK_NAME = EXCLUDED.TRUNK_NAME, DIRECTION = EXCLUDED.DIRECTION, TARGET_SYSNAME = EXCLUDED.TARGET_SYSNAME, WARNING_DATE = EXCLUDED.WARNING_DATE
